lines.left: Use: Restores 294 health and 294 mana over 21 sec. Must remain seated while eating.
Use: Summons a tracking hound that will protect you for 10 min.
"Used by blacksmiths and jewelcrafters to remove impurities."
Equip: Deals 5 Fire damage to anyone who strikes you with a melee attack.
"A crescent moon dangling from a silver chain."
Use: Restores 243 health over 21 sec.  Must remain seated while eating.  If you spend at least 10 seconds eating you will become well fed and gain 4 Stamina and Spirit for 15 min.
Use: Restores 552 health over 24 sec.  Must remain seated while eating.  If you spend at least 10 seconds eating you will become well fed and gain 6 Stamina and Spirit for 15 min.

Use: Restores 1344 mana over 27 sec.  Must remain seated while drinking.

Use: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.
Each strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy, slowing their movement speed by 50% for 12 sec.

Use: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.
Each strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy, slowing their movement speed by 60% for 12 sec.
Use: Gives the imbiber lesser invisibility for 15 sec.
Use: When applied to a melee weapon it gives a 15% chance of casting Shadowbolt III at the opponent when it hits.  Lasts 30 minutes.
Use: Increases the player's maximum health by 120 for 1 hour.
Use: Regenerate 12 health every 5 sec for 1 hour.
Use: Grants detect lesser invisibility for 10 min.
Use: When applied to a melee weapon it gives a 10% chance of casting Frostbolt at the opponent when it hits.  Lasts 30 minutes.
Equip: Your attacks ignore 25 of the target's armor.
Equip: Increases your attack and casting speed by 1%.
Equip: Your attacks ignore 20 of the target's armor.
Equip: 1% of damage dealt is returned as healing.
Equip: Your attacks ignore 15 of the target's armor.
Equip: Increases your attack and casting speed by 1%.
Equip: Improves your chance to get a critical strike by 1%.
Chance on hit: Launches a bolt of frost at the enemy causing 20 to 30 Frost damage and slowing movement speed by 50% for 5 sec.
Use: Teaches you how to make a Jade Serpentblade.
Requires Iron Bar (8), Strong Flux (2), Heavy Grinding Stone (2), Jade (2), Heavy Leather (3)
Use: Teaches you how to make a Frost Tiger Blade.
Equip: Improves your chance to get a critical strike by 1%.
Chance on hit: Launches a bolt of frost at the enemy causing 20 to 30 Frost damage and slowing movement speed by 50% for 5 sec.
Requires Steel Bar (8), Strong Flux (2), Heavy Grinding Stone (2), Jade (2), Frost Oil, Heavy Leather (4)
Use: Teaches you how to make a Shadow Crescent Axe.
Requires Steel Bar (10), Strong Flux (2), Heavy Grinding Stone (3), Citrine (2), Shadow Oil, Heavy Leather (3)
Use: Teaches you how to make Green Iron Shoulders.
Requires Iron Bar (7), Heavy Grinding Stone, Green Dye
Use: Teaches you how to make Golden Scale Shoulders.
Equip: Increases your attack and casting speed by 1%.
Requires Steel Bar (6), Gold Bar (2), Heavy Grinding Stone
Use: Teaches you how to make Golden Scale Leggings.
Equip: Your attacks ignore 20 of the target's armor.
Requires Iron Bar (10), Gold Bar (2), Heavy Grinding Stone
Use: Teaches you how to make a Golden Scale Cuirass.
Equip: 1% of damage dealt is returned as healing.
Equip: Your attacks ignore 15 of the target's armor.
Requires Steel Bar (12), Gold Bar (2), Heavy Grinding Stone (4), Jade (2)
Chance on hit: Slows the target's movement by 50% for 10 sec.
Equip: Increases your lockpicking skill slightly.
Equip: Increases damage and healing done by magical spells and effects by up to 8.
Use: Permanently increase the armor value of an item worn on the chest, legs, hands or feet by 24 and Stamina by 3. Only usable on items level 15 and above.
Equip: Increases damage done by Fire spells and effects by up to 10.
Equip: Increases damage done by Frost spells and effects by up to 10.
Equip: Increases damage done by Shadow spells and effects by up to 7.
Equip: Increases damage done by Frost spells and effects by up to 7.
Use: Removes existing Immobilizing effects and makes you immune to Immobilizing effects for 5 sec.
Equip: Increases damage and healing done by magical spells and effects by up to 13.
Equip: Increases damage done by Fire spells and effects by up to 9.
Use: Inflicts 26 to 34 Fire damage in a 5 yard radius.
Use: Inflicts 22 to 28 Fire damage and stuns targets in a 3 yard radius for 1 sec.  Any damage will break the effect.
Use: Inflicts 51 to 69 Fire damage in a 5 yard radius.
Use: Drops a target dummy on the ground that attracts nearby monsters to attack it.  Lasts for 15 seconds or until killed.
Use: Blasts open simple locked doors.
Use: Inflicts 43 to 57 Fire damage and stuns targets in a 5 yard radius for 1 sec.  Any damage will break the effect.
Use: Inflicts 73 to 97 Fire damage and stuns targets in a 3 yard radius for 2 sec.  Any damage will break the effect.
Use: Absorbs 500 fire damage.  Lasts 1 min.
Use: Inflicts 128 to 172 Fire damage in a 5 yard radius.
Use: Inflicts 85 to 115 Fire damage and stuns targets in a 5 yard radius for 2 sec.  Any damage will break the effect.
Use: Dispels Polymorph effects on a friendly target.  Also restores 150 to 250 health and mana.
Use: Summons an Explosive Sheep which will charge at a nearby enemy and explode for 135 to 165 damage.  Lasts for 3 min or until it explodes.
Use: Absorbs 600 frost damage.  Lasts 1 min.
Use: Transforms the target into a Leper Gnome, reducing its melee and spell damage by 40 and its movement rate by 20% for 12 sec.
Use: Inflicts 132 to 218 Fire damage and stuns targets for 3 sec in a 3 yard radius.  Any damage will break the effect.
Use: Creates a Compact Harvest Reaper that will fight for you for 10 min or until it is destroyed.
Use: Drops a target dummy on the ground that attracts nearby monsters to attack it. Lasts for 15 seconds or until killed.
Equip: Increases your attack and casting speed by 1%.
Use: Inflicts 149 to 201 Fire damage and stuns targets in a 5 yard radius for 3 sec.  Any damage will break the effect.
Use: Places the Goblin Land Mine on the ground.  It will explode for 394 to 506 fire damage the next time a hostile creature passes near it.  The mine has a duration of 1 min.
Use: Activates your Mechanical Dragonling to fight for you for 1 min.  It requires an hour to cool down before it can be used again.
Use: Gives invisibility for 10 sec.  It can only be used every 60 minutes.
Use: Blasts open difficult locked doors.
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"A marvel of gnomish engineering, this box contains a mischievous mechanical squirrel ready to assist you in your adventures."
Use: Inflicts 85 to 115 Fire damage and stuns targets in a 5 yard radius for 2 sec.  Any damage will break the effect.
Use: Attaches a permanent scope to a bow or gun that increases its damage by 1.
Use: Attaches a permanent scope to a bow or gun that increases its damage by 2.
Use: Attaches a permanent scope to a bow or gun that increases its damage by 3.
Use: Teaches you how to make a Flame Deflector.
Use: Absorbs 500 fire damage.  Lasts 1 min.
Requires Whirring Bronze Gizmo, Small Flame Sac
Use: Teaches you how to make a Discombobulator Ray.
Use: Transforms the target into a Leper Gnome, reducing its melee and spell damage by 40 and its movement rate by 20% for 12 sec.
Requires Whirring Bronze Gizmo (3), Silk Cloth (2), Jade, Bronze Tube
Use: Teaches you how to make a Craftman's Monocle.
Equip: Increases your attack and casting speed by 1%.
Chance on hit: Poisons target for 5 Nature damage every 3 sec for 15 sec.
Use: Restores 874 health over 27 sec.  Must remain seated while eating.  If you spend at least 10 seconds eating you will become well fed and gain 8 Stamina and Spirit for 15 min.
Equip: 1% of damage dealt is returned as healing.

Use: Causes all Beasts in a 5 yard radius to run away for 10 sec.
Use: Restores 243 health over 21 sec.  Must remain seated while eating.

Equip: Increases damage done by Fire spells and effects by up to 7.
"A crude wand once wielded by a member of the Burning Blade."

Use: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.
Each strike has a 20% chance of poisoning the enemy, increasing their casting time by 40% for 10 sec.  50 charges.
Use: This weak beer increases your Spirit by 1 and decreases your Stamina by 1 for 10 min.

Chance on hit: Wounds the target causing them to bleed for 80 damage over 30 sec.
Use: Makes you immune to Stun and Movement Impairing effects for the next 30 sec.   Does not remove effects already on the imbiber.
Races: Orc, Undead, Tauren, Troll, Goblin
Use: Adds a mount to the player's mount collection.
"Can howl loudly enough to be heard for miles."
Chance on hit: Blasts a target for 45 Frost damage.
Use: Teleport to your Guild House.
Use: Allows the Imbiber to breathe water for 30 min.
Use: Increases armor by 50 for 1 hour.
Use: Restores 874 health over 27 sec.  Must remain seated while eating.  If you spend at least 10 seconds eating you will become well fed and gain 8 Stamina and Spirit for 15 min.
Equip: Your attacks ignore 10 of the target's armor.
Use: Attaches a chain to your weapon, making it impossible to disarm.
Use: Attaches an Iron Spike to your shield that deals damage every time you block with it.
Use: Attaches a counterweight to a two-handed sword, mace, axe, staff, or polearm, increasing attack speed by 3%.
Use: Absorbs 675 to 1125 shadow damage.  Lasts 1 hour.
Use: Absorbs 975 to 1625 fire damage.  Lasts 1 hour.
Use: Absorbs 1350 to 2250 frost damage.  Lasts 1 hour.
Use: Absorbs 300 to 500 holy damage.  Lasts 1 hour.
Use: Absorbs 1350 to 2250 nature damage.  Lasts 1 hour.
Equip: Increase the Spirit of nearby party members by 4.
